case_title: ALBERT LEONG ET AL VS. REDWOOD PROPERTY INVESTORS II, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100048389)
NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT, SIGNED JUN-01-2018, SERVED MAR-29-2018 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEONG, ALBERT LEONG, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT REDWOOD PROPERTY INVESTORS II, LLC
